Title: Getting Started with Aurii
Body: Aurii is a declarative runtime for structured knowledge. This guide walks you through the basics of defining schemas and importing data.
Author: Alice Andersen

Title: Schema-first Design
Body: When you declare your data structure before writing code, everything becomes simpler. Aurii makes schema-first design practical.
Author: Bob Bakke

Title: Import as a First-class Capability
Body: Most platforms treat import as an afterthought. In Aurii, import is a product with validation, mapping, and repeatability built in.
Author: Alice Andersen

Title: The Query Language
Body: Aurii v0 ships with a readable query language. From selecting fields to filtering by conditions, it stays close to natural language.
Author: Charlie Christoffersen

Title: Draft: Event-driven Architecture
Body: Events connect the platform without creating direct dependencies. This post explores the event model planned for Phase 2.
Author: Bob Bakke

Title: Draft: Plugin Runtime
Body: The plugin runtime will allow extending Aurii without touching Core. Still in design.
Author: Alice Andersen
